facebook.caption: 4.4 stars at Cửa Lấp, Phú Quốc. 69 reviewers figured out what most tourists scroll past. Jerry's Jungle Tours runs trips into the parts of Phu Quoc that look nothing like the resort strip. Real jungle. Real guides. Real different. If your Phu Quoc trip is all beach bars and pool loungers, no judgment. But this exists. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
